title: (Bullish Signal) CPSH, Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend on February 16, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Over the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that CPSH's AroonUp green line (see chart) is above 70, while the AroonDown red line is below 30. When the green line goes above 70 while the red line stays below 30, this is an indicator that the stock could be poised for a strong Uptrend. For traders, this could mean going long the stock or exploring call options in the next month. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 106 similar cases, 93 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 88%. Current price $25.25 is above $3.25 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 01/13/21 - 02/16/21, the price experienced a +260% Uptrend. During the week of 02/08/21 - 02/16/21, the stock enjoyed a +32% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/76yr4n6e72i61.png?width=1525&format=png&auto=webp&s=16fe7e79d717269c7bef654a09931c9a358fb3b0

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on February 03, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on CPSH as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 110 of 128 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 86%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for CPSH just turned positive on February 03, 2021. Looking at past instances where CPSH's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that  in 50 of 57 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

CPSH moved above its 50-day Moving Average on November 13, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

Following a +28.42% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where CPSH advanced for three days, in 151 of 175 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 86%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 93 of 106 cases where CPSH Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 88%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9361953-cps-technologies-s-cpsh-26-89-aroon-indicator-entered-an-uptrend-on-february-16-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
